data.name: Faye

weaponImprint.name: Hestia
weaponImprint.trait: Stability damage taken by enemy units within 3 tiles is increased by 1 point.
weaponImprint.effect: Physical damage is increased by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%. When attacking, if the distance to the enemy target is 3 or less tiles, damage dealt is increased by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to targets with defense debuffs is increased by 2.5%. Damage dealt to Sycca Technologies units is increased by 2.5%.

data.effects: A Doll whose appearance contrasts greatly with her personality. Small in stature yet imposing, she carries a gun in one hand and an axe in another, creating a presence that would scare off most people. However, if you are willing to look pass her appearance and get to understand her better, you will find that, behind her intolerant expression and irritable tone lies a delicate, sensitive soul. She too, is awaiting your warmth.

skills.name: Practice Shot
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Tomahawk Combo
skills.description:
When attacking, Faye ignores an amount of the target's defense equal to (2%× number of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] stacks) and recovers HP equal to 10% + (2%× number of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] stacks) of Max HP.

At the end of an enemy unit's action, if it is within 6 tiles, Faye throws a tomahawk at it, gains 1 point of Confectance Index, applies 1 stack of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] to it, and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack and 2 points of stability damage. If the enemy is within 3 tiles, Faye performs an axe whirl instead; gains 1 point of Confectance Index, applies 2 stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] to all enemy units within 3 tiles, and deals AoE Physical damage equal to 60% of attack and 1 point of stability damage. This effect can trigger up to 2 times a turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
When attacking, Faye ignores an amount of the target's defense equal to 4%× number of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] stacks and recovers HP equal to 10% + 2%× number of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] stacks of Max HP.

At the end of an enemy unit's action, if it is within 6 tiles, Faye throws a tomahawk at it, gains 1 point of Confectance Index, applies 1 stack of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] to it, and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack and 2 points of stability damage. If the enemy is within 3 tiles, Faye performs an axe whirl instead; gains 1 point of Confectance Index, applies 2 stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] to all enemy units within 3 tiles, and deals AoE Physical damage equal to 60% of attack and 1 point of stability damage. This effect can trigger up to 2 times a turn.

At the end of an enemy unit's action, if it holds 2 or more stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b], Faye applies 2 stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] to the nearest enemy unit.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
When attacking, Faye ignores an amount of the target's defense equal to (4%× number of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] stacks) and recovers HP equal to 10% + (2%× number of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] stacks) of Max HP.

At the end of an enemy unit's action, if it is within 6 tiles, Faye throws a tomahawk at it, gains 1 point of Confectance Index, applies 1 stack of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] to it, and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack and 2 points of stability damage. If the enemy is within 3 tiles, Faye performs an axe whirl instead; gains 1 point of Confectance Index, applies 2 stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] to all enemy units within 3 tiles, and deals AoE Physical damage equal to 60% of attack and 1 point of stability damage. This effect can trigger up to 2 times a turn.

At the end of an enemy unit's action, if it holds 2 or more stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b], Faye applies 2 stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] to the nearest enemy unit.

At the end of Faye's action, she performs an axe whirl and applies [effect:42d85a9b-2025-4f14-b4c2-df25f9c11bd3] to all enemy units within the area for 1 turn.
Damage dealt by this attack is increased by 30%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
The amount of defense ignore by per stack of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] is increased by 2%.
At the end of an enemy unit's action, if it holds 2 or more stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b], Faye applies 2 stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] to the nearest enemy unit.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
At the end of Faye's action, performs an axe whirl and applies [effect:42d85a9b-2025-4f14-b4c2-df25f9c11bd3] to all enemy units within the area for 1 turn.
Damage dealt by this attack is increased by 30%.

skills.name: Ruinous Whirl
skills.description:
Expends all Confectance Index. For each point of Confectance Index expended, Faye applies 1 stack of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] to all enemy units within 3 tiles, pulls them 2 tiles toward self, and deals AoE Physical damage equal to 80% of attack, while also applying [effect:42d85a9b-2025-4f14-b4c2-df25f9c11bd3] for 1 turn.
Faye gains 8 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef] and [effect:b612d113-bb5d-4b9e-b51f-fb757caef5c7] for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Expends all Confectance Index. For each point of Confectance Index expended, Faye applies 1 stack of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] to all enemy units within 3 tiles, pulls them 2 tiles toward self, and deals AoE Physical damage equal to 100% of attack, while also applying [effect:42d85a9b-2025-4f14-b4c2-df25f9c11bd3] for 2 turns.
Faye gains 8 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef] and [effect:b612d113-bb5d-4b9e-b51f-fb757caef5c7] for 2 turns. After this skill is used, Faye cleanses all defense and movement debuffs on self.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Damage multiplier is increased by 20%. Duration of [effect:42d85a9b-2025-4f14-b4c2-df25f9c11bd3] and [effect:b612d113-bb5d-4b9e-b51f-fb757caef5c7] is increased by 1 turn.
After this skill is used, Faye cleanses all defense and movement debuffs on self.

skills.name: Fissioned Firelight
skills.description: Faye gains 2 points of Confectance Index. Selects an enemy target within 6 tiles, applies 2 stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] to it, and deals Physical damage equal to 120% of attack.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Faye gains 2 points of Confectance Index. Selects an enemy target within 6 tiles, applies 2 stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] to it, and deals Physical damage equal to 140% of attack.

If the enemy target holds 4 or more stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] after Faye uses this skill, Faye additionally applies a number of stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] equal to the number of stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] to it.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Damage multiplier is increased by 20%. If the enemy target holds 4 or more stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] after Faye uses this skill, Faye additionally applies a number of stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] equal to the number of stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] to it.

skills.name: No Survivors
skills.description:
Selects an enemy target within 6 tiles. Applies a number of stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] equal to the stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] to all enemies holding [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] within 6 tiles, and deals Physical damage equal to 160% of attack to it.
If the target holds 6 or more stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b], expends 6 stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] from the target to increase the damage that the target takes from this attack by 120%.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Applies 4 stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] to all enemy units on the field. If an enemy unit holds [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b], Faye additionally applies a number of stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] equal to the stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b]. Selects an enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 160% of attack to it.
If the enemy target holds 6 or more stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b], expends 6 stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] from the target to increase the damage that the target takes from this attack by 120%. At the end of Faye's action, triggers effects of all stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] but does not expend the stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a].
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Applies 4 stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] to all enemy units on the field. If an enemy unit holds [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b], Faye additionally applies a number of stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] equal to the stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b]. Selects an enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 160% of attack.
If the enemy target holds 6 or more stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b], expends 6 stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b].
For each stack of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] that the enemy target holds, damage taken from this attack is increased by 20%, to a maximum increase of 160%.
Each stack of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] increases Faye's critical rate for this attack by 5% and critical damage for this attack by 2%. At the end of Faye's action, triggers effects of all stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] but does not expend the stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The effect of applying [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] to all enemies around Faye with [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] is changed as follows: Applies 4 stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] to all enemy units with stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b], applies an equal number of stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] to them. At the end of Faye's action, triggers all stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] but does not expend the stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
The effects applied when the target holds 6 or more stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] is changed as follows:
Expends 6 stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] that the enemy target holds, damage taken from this attack is increased by 20%, to a maximum increase of 160%.
Each stack of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] increase's Faye's critical rate for this attack by 5% and critical damage for this attack by 2%.

keys.keyTitle: The Line Between Life and Death
keys.displayTitle: Affinity Key - The Line Between Life and Death

keys.effect: Physical damage taken by enemy units within 3 tiles is increased by 5%.

When dealing damage to an enemy with [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a], ignore 50% of the target's defense and increase attack by 15%.

After using the Ultimate skill No Survivors, apply 2 stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b].

After using her Tomahawk Combo, apply [effect:42d85a9b-2025-4f14-b4c2-df25f9c11bd3] to targets hit for 1 turn.
Every enemy unit on the field with [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] increases Faye's mobility by 1 tile, to a maximum increase of 3 tiles.
When the active skill Ruinous Whirl only hits one enemy unit, damage dealt is increased by 20%.
At the start of the battle, gains 3 points of Confectance Index.
When Faye's HP is lower than 50%, healing effect received is increased by 30%.
At the end of Faye's action, if there are enemy units with [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] within 2 tiles, Faye gains [effect:5d5f7297-bbae-4eab-88b1-617b81c905c1] for 1 turn.
When an enemy unit with [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] dies, Faye's attack is increased by 4%, to a maximum increase of 20%.

vertebrae.effect:
The amount of defense ignore by per stack of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] is increased by 2%.
At the end of an enemy unit's action, if it holds 2 or more stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b], Faye applies 2 stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] to the nearest enemy unit.

doll.name: Faye
doll.effects: A Doll whose appearance contrasts greatly with her personality. Small in stature yet imposing, she carries a gun in one hand and an axe in another, creating a presence that would scare off most people. However, if you are willing to look pass her appearance and get to understand her better, you will find that, behind her intolerant expression and irritable tone lies a delicate, sensitive soul. She too, is awaiting your warmth.

vertebrae.effect: The effect of applying [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] to all enemies around Faye with [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] is changed as follows: Applies 4 stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] to all enemy units with stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b], applies an equal number of stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] to them. At the end of Faye's action, triggers all stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] but does not expend the stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a].

doll.name: Faye
doll.effects: A Doll whose appearance contrasts greatly with her personality. Small in stature yet imposing, she carries a gun in one hand and an axe in another, creating a presence that would scare off most people. However, if you are willing to look pass her appearance and get to understand her better, you will find that, behind her intolerant expression and irritable tone lies a delicate, sensitive soul. She too, is awaiting your warmth.

skillsLevel2.name: No Survivors
skillsLevel2.description:
Selects an enemy target within 6 tiles. Applies a number of stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] equal to the stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] to all enemies holding [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] within 6 tiles, and deals Physical damage equal to 160% of attack to it.
If the target holds 6 or more stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b], expends 6 stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] from the target to increase the damage that the target takes from this attack by 120%.
skillsLevel2.descriptionLevel2:
Applies 4 stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] to all enemy units on the field. If an enemy unit holds [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b], Faye additionally applies a number of stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] equal to the stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b]. Selects an enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 160% of attack to it.
If the enemy target holds 6 or more stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b], expends 6 stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] from the target to increase the damage that the target takes from this attack by 120%. At the end of Faye's action, triggers effects of all stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] but does not expend the stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a].
skillsLevel2.descriptionLevel3:
Applies 4 stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] to all enemy units on the field. If an enemy unit holds [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b], Faye additionally applies a number of stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] equal to the stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b]. Selects an enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 160% of attack.
If the enemy target holds 6 or more stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b], expends 6 stacks of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b].
For each stack of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] that the enemy target holds, damage taken from this attack is increased by 20%, to a maximum increase of 160%.
Each stack of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] increases Faye's critical rate for this attack by 5% and critical damage for this attack by 2%. At the end of Faye's action, triggers effects of all stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] but does not expend the stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a].

doll.name: Faye

skillsLevel2.name: Ruinous Whirl
skillsLevel2.description:
Expends all Confectance Index. For each point of Confectance Index expended, Faye applies 1 stack of [effect:f502fa4a-a0db-4f3a-8b8e-37b65345be0b] to all enemy units within 3 tiles, pulls them 2 tiles toward self, and deals AoE Physical damage equal to 80% of attack, while also applying [effect:42d85a9b-2025-4f14-b4c2-df25f9c11bd3] for 1 turn.
Faye gains 8 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef] and [effect:b612d113-bb5d-4b9e-b51f-fb757caef5c7] for 1 turn.

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt to enemy units with defense debuffs is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Physical damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets with 50% or lower Hp is increased by 10%.
Damage dealt to enemy units within 3 tiles is increased by 12%.

dollEffects.effectDetails: Can move through tiles occupied by enemies. Considered a Buff, cannot be cleansed.

At the end of the debuff holder's action, takes fixed damage equal to 8% of the applier's attack for each stack of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a] and expends 2 stacks of [effect:8edd061d-c69c-4418-abda-c131b1f0ac1a]. Considered a Debuff.
Physical damage taken is increased by 30%. Up to 8 instances can be active at once (this effect does not stack). Considered a Defense debuff, cannot be cleansed.
